title: SaaS Product & Customer Analytics
description: Track subscription churn, feature adoption, product engagement, and support health across your SaaS customer base.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

layers: Bronze (Raw Accounts, Users, Product Events, Support Tickets)

sampleData.description: 2,000 SaaS accounts with plan, MRR, industry, and churn flag
10,000 user records with role, last login, and activation status
200,000 product events with feature, action, and session details
20,000 support tickets with priority, category, resolution time

fabricItems.name: technology_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all SaaS analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Derive churn risk flags, DAU/WAU/MAU, feature adoption bands, and ticket SLA flags

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: account health, feature adoption, churn analysis, support performance, weekly engagement trends, account scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, churn risk accounts, feature usage, support SLA breaches

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, churn risk table, and feature adoption summary

fabricItems.name: technology_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with account health, engagement, and support measures

fabricItems.name: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Account Health, Product Engagement, Support Performance

fabricItems.name: daily_technology_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
